@且看此图 快更一天两张，一张根本不够看","text_exts":[{"e":27,"s":23,"text":"赛博朋克","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177410271749FAA190%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227575353584577971006%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227559057127961021464%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":117,"s":114,"text":"意难平","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%84%8F%E9%9A%BE%E5%B9%B3&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177410271749FAA190%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227575353584577971006%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227559057127961021464%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%84%8F%E9%9A%BE%E5%B9%B3%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":143,"s":137,"text":"","tp":2,"uri":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1RJFq0nN002Se/bJlDbPcT7QLJwLYzNg5Elp4waPhj+"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763776717,"group_id":"7559057127961021464","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"误闯天家了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N130JJRiMwozJwXxEq3E6Xklq2UW42iZFNOBpOv/PXBw","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"1504600500994908","user_name":"白鱼黑墨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1504600500994908","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1663169197,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7559057127961021464","book_info":{"abstract":"作为华夏三好青年的林彻，因为一次意外，穿越到了《赛博朋克边缘行者》前的时间线
因为好奇打开了东瀛父亲的电脑，发现了一些不该发现的东西，于是与父亲起了冲突，在冲突中父亲拔了枪，母亲因为保护林彻，因此而死，随后他的父亲将他送到了华沙东郊维斯拉河沿岸的荒诞设施，在那他遇到了小时候的露西……
好消息:有系统。
坏消息:有点坑。
好消息:系统可以召唤异世玩家。
坏消息:玩家之中有坏人想肉身直接降临赛博朋克世界
……（要看纯爽的话，番茄有别的优秀作品）
（多女主目前单女，第2个女主出来的时候会删掉多女主之外的内容（仅限于该括号））
（微群像+玩家+系统）
（为什么是微群像，一、有些爽点需要铺垫，所以需要用别人的视角用不同的看法来达到更好的效果。二、时间线定的太早，开始是将男主的出生年份和露西的出生年份定在一起，其中会有大卫的戏份，但是大卫跟露西的戏份中没有情侣戏份了，所以原著CP党就很抱歉）（小提示：大卫遇见露西的时候，孩子都一岁多了）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/f73e6526e9fc0cdf29011b60bd69e6be~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"且看此图","author_id":"","book_id":"7559057127961021464","book_name":"赛博朋克被关荒坂设施遇见露西","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102058","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7559063274818388504","read_count":"794","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"425767"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"109","tags":"科幻末世,赛博朋克,第四天灾,系统,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/f73e6526e9fc0cdf29011b60bd69e6be~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779286717&x-signature=awjDnnGj2BOSOe%2FkGnUpk4THFds%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2282201992136676","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"40"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321221837DB709C367B9349FAA190"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_
